free_text: Yields of 165Tm, 166Tm, 167Tm, 168Tm, 170Tm in
reactions with protons, deuterons and alpha particles
English translation
Data from the author.
By P.P.Dmitriev
BIB section was updated
Corrections were made according to new EXFOR rules.
.Ref. on Engl. transl. was added.
SD: REACTION code was updated according to
MEMO CP-D/933rev. in Subents 002-004. BIB was updated.
SD: Corrections in all Subents. Several
Subents were split.
Samples of erbium oxide Er2O3 (conversion ratio of
yield to pure erbium 1.28)
The integrated bombardment current was measured by the
activity of 65Zn in 18 mg/cm 2 copper monitor foils.
The uncertainties of the yields
include systematic error of nuclide activity
measurement and error of integral current measurement
SD: SF8=DT -> PHY in REACTION code.
SD: Subent was split in five (see
Subents 005-008). STATUS updated.
The integrated bombardment current was measured by the
activity of 65Zn in 18 mg/cm 2 copper monitor foils.
Samples of erbium oxide Er2O3 (conversion ratio of
yield to pure erbium 1.28)
The uncertainties of the yields
include systematic error of nuclide activity
measurement and error of integral current measurement.
SD: SF8=DT -> PHY in REACTION code.
SD: Subent was split in five (see
Subents 009-012). STATUS updated.
Stack of holmium metal foils of average
thickness ~ 25 mg/cm2
The uncertainties of the yields
include systematic error of nuclide activity
measurement and error of integral current measurement.
SD: SF8=DT -> PHY in REACTION code.
MONITOR corrected.
SD: Subent was split in four (see
Subents 013-015). STATUS updated.
Samples of erbium oxide Er2O3 (conversion ratio of
yield to pure erbium 1.28)
The integrated bombardment current was measured by the
activity of 65Zn in 18 mg/cm 2 copper monitor foils.
The uncertainties of the yields
include systematic error of nuclide activity
measurement and error of integral current measurement.
SD: Part of Subent 002.

SD: Part of Subent 002.
Samples of erbium oxide Er2O3 (conversion ratio of
yield to pure erbium 1.28)
The integrated bombardment current was measured by the
activity of 65Zn in 18 mg/cm 2 copper monitor foils.
The uncertainties of the yields
include systematic error of nuclide activity
measurement and error of integral current measurement.
The uncertainties of the Tm-170 yield determine by
exception procedure of 79.82 keV Tu-168 gamma-line
background in 84.26 keV Tu-170 gamma-line
photopeak (18-20%).
